title: Závist (Blansko District)

infobox.value: is a municipality and village in [Blansko District](/wiki/Blansko_District "Blansko District") in the [South Moravian Region](/wiki/South_Moravian_Region "South Moravian Region") of the [Czech Republic](/wiki/Czech_Republic "Czech Republic"). It has about 200 inhabitants.

**Závist** is a municipality and village in [Blansko District](/wiki/Blansko_District "Blansko District") in the [South Moravian Region](/wiki/South_Moravian_Region "South Moravian Region") of the [Czech Republic](/wiki/Czech_Republic "Czech Republic"). It has about 200 inhabitants.

## Geography

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Z%C3%A1vist_(Blansko_District)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Geography")]

Závist is located about 5 kilometres (3 mi) west of [Blansko](/wiki/Blansko "Blansko") and 18 km (11 mi) north of [Brno](/wiki/Brno "Brno"). The southern part of the municipality with the built-up area lies in the northern tip of the [Bobrava Highlands](/w/index.php?title=Bobrava_Highlands&action=edit&redlink=1 "Bobrava Highlands (page does not exist)"), the northern part lies in the [Drahany Highlands](/w/index.php?title=Drahany_Highlands&action=edit&redlink=1 "Drahany Highlands (page does not exist)"). The highest point is at 475 m (1,558 ft) above sea level.

With an area of 0.42 km2 (0.16 sq mi), Závist is the smallest municipality in the country.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Z%C3%A1vist_(Blansko_District)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: History")]

Závist was founded in 1776.[[3]](#cite_note-3)

## Transport

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Z%C3%A1vist_(Blansko_District)&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Transport")]

The I/43 road (part of [European route E461](/wiki/European_route_E461 "European route E461")), which connects [Brno](/wiki/Brno "Brno") with [Svitavy](/wiki/Svitavy "Svitavy"), passes through Závist.

## Sights

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Z%C3%A1vist_(Blansko_District)&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Sights")]

There are no protected [cultural monuments](/wiki/Cultural_monument_(Czech_Republic) "Cultural monument (Czech Republic)") in the municipality.[[6]](#cite_note-6) The main landmark of Závist is a belfry from 1833. Next to the belfry is a cross from 1857.[[7]](#cite_note-7)
